---
title: "Notes on urban mobility and welfare"
date: 2026-03-21
description: "A placeholder entry for future posts on transport policy, public transit, and welfare measurement."
categories: [placeholder, research]
title-block-banner: false
---

This placeholder is reserved for future writing on transport policy, urban mobility, and welfare effects.

As the site evolves, this is where I can write through data questions, empirical strategies, and policy interpretations in a lighter format than a formal research paper.
